title: Excavation Shovel
description: Take your mining and digging to the next level with Excavation Tools!
body:
# Excavation Shovel 🪏
### ⭐️ Take your mining and digging to the next level with Excavation Tools! 


**This mod adds an enhanced Excavation shovel enchantment that lets you clear huge areas of blocks in a single swing.**

### Features:

**Durability-aware:** Shovels wear down naturally

**Sneak to precision:** Hold Shift to break a single block instead of the full area

Blocks drop items normally, so you don’t lose any resources


### How to use:

- Trade with villagers or explore to find the new enchantment 'Excavation'. 
- Can be enchanted onto any type of shovel.
- Can create 3x3 holes with this enchantment.

_Fully compatible with Fabric 1.21.11._
